meta_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no project ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit to overcome the 'no project ideas' trap. A beginner tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code for fast MVP builds.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing the 'perfect' idea. Use a SaaS starter kit to build a micro-utility that solves a boring, profitable problem immediately. By leveraging Antigravity and Claude Code, you can scaffold, deploy, and monetize a functional MVP in hours, turning execution speed into your primary competitive advantage and revenue driver.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You’ve spent weeks agonizing over the 'next big thing,' waiting for a lightning bolt of genius that never arrives. Meanwhile, the market is starving for simple, reliable tools that shave ten minutes off a daily workflow. The paralysis of choice is not a lack of creativity; it is a lack of a system.

True founders don't wait for inspiration; they engineer it through iteration. By utilizing a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you bypass the soul-crushing boilerplate phase and get straight to the only thing that matters: user feedback and revenue. It is time to stop thinking like a dreamer and start building like a CEO.

steps.title: Select a High-Velocity Niche
steps.description: Identify a small, painful task in a niche you understand. Use the starter kit to focus on one single core feature.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS architect. Generate 5 micro-SaaS ideas that solve specific, boring administrative problems for small e-commerce owners. Focus on high-frequency, low-complexity solutions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Give me a list of 5 high-demand micro-SaaS niches with a clear monetization path'

steps.title: Initialize the Starter Kit
steps.description: Scaffold your production-ready environment using the starter kit to ensure authentication, database, and payments are pre-configured.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a project structure for a Next.js + Supabase SaaS starter kit, including user auth, Stripe integration, and a clean dashboard layout.

steps.title: Build the MVP Core Feature
steps.description: Implement the single feature that solves your identified problem. Keep it lean; avoid feature creep at all costs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust function to handle the core logic of [INSERT IDEA]. Ensure it is optimized for speed and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Implement the core logic for the [Feature Name] in src/lib/core.ts'

steps.title: Integrate Monetization
steps.description: Connect Stripe to your starter kit so you can start taking payments on Day 1.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a guide to integrating Stripe Checkout with my Next.js app, including webhooks for handling successful subscriptions.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Push your code to Vercel and share your link with 10 potential users to get your first validation signal.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment checklist for a production SaaS app to ensure security, performance, and SEO readiness.

pro_tips: Prioritize 'boring' SaaS ideas; they have higher customer retention and lower churn than viral consumer apps.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests as you build; it forces you to clarify your business logic early.
Ship your landing page before the backend is finished; if nobody clicks 'Buy', don't write the code.
Always include a 'Request a Feature' button on your MVP dashboard to crowdsource your product roadmap.
Keep your tech stack identical across all projects to build muscle memory and increase deployment speed.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend 80% of your time on distribution. Reach out to your first 10 users manually, listen to their feedback, and iterate the product based on actual usage data, not your assumptions.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark and start shipping products that generate recurring revenue. Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
